summary: Frontend testing for interaction polish fixes: dark mode default, navigation scroll, animations, theme toggle. All major fixes verified working. Blog navigation issue from iteration 3 is fixed.

issues: Minor: Sections appear at ~160px from viewport top instead of expected ~96px after nav click. Functional but slight offset difference. User experience not significantly impacted.

passed_tests: Dark mode is default on page load - no flash of light mode (body bg: rgb(9, 9, 11))
Theme toggle works - clicking sun icon switches to light mode, moon icon to dark
Navigation component present with all nav links (About, Work, Projects, Skills, Terminal, Contact, Blog)
Nav link clicks smoothly scroll to respective sections
Active section highlighting works - nav links turn accent color (rgb(245, 158, 11)) when scrolled to section
Experience cards expand/collapse with smooth animation
Terminal input accepts commands (help, about, ls projects/, neofetch, cat skills)
Terminal displays correct output for all commands
Blog link navigates to /blog page correctly (fixed from iteration 3)
Navigation component now present on blog pages (fixed from iteration 3)
Recruiter mode toggle works - changes About section content from narrative to bullet points
Light mode has proper contrast (bg: rgb(250, 250, 250), fg: rgb(24, 24, 27))
All sections (About, Experience, Projects, Skills, Terminal, Contact) are accessible via navigation
Smooth scroll behavior enabled in CSS
context_for_next_testing_agent: All interaction polish fixes verified. Dark mode default, navigation scroll, theme toggle, animations all working. Blog pages now have navigation component. Minor scroll offset variance (~160px vs expected ~96px) but functionally correct.
fixes_verified_from_previous_iterations: Blog pages now have Navigation component (was CRITICAL in iteration 3)
Blog nav link now navigates to /blog correctly (was HIGH priority in iteration 3)
